result.stdout:
Description:
  Mainframe CI Tool

Usage:
  mg-cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  test                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Test command
  commit                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Commit and tag the build
  discord-hook                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Send a Discord webhook with the latest build info
  godot-build                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Builds a Godot project.
  godot-setup                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Installs the Godot engine and export templates.
  godot-version                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Increments the version in the project.godot file.
  godot-import <Path to Godot project> <Version of Godot to use>                                                                                                                                                                    Runs import process for Godot
  itchio-setup                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Downloads and installed Butler
  itchio-deploy <Path to the build directory> <e.g. <company>/<game-name>:<platform>>                                                                                                                                               Deploys a game to itch.io
  steamcmd-setup                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Setup SteamCMD
  steam-deploy                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Deploy to Steam
  csproj-versioning <Path to the .csproj> <The XML tag to update with the version number. Default is 'AssemblyVersion'.>                                                                                                            Commands related to versioning and git tags [default: AssemblyVersion]
  digitalocean <The IP address of the DigitalOcean droplet to deploy to> <The path to the systemd service file to deploy. e.g ./master_server.service> <The path to the build directory on the server. e.g ./builds/master_server>  Manage DigitalOcean resources

commands.payload:
Description:
  Mainframe CI Tool

Usage:
  mg-cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  test                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Test command
  commit                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Commit and tag the build
  discord-hook                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Send a Discord webhook with the latest build info
  godot-build                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Builds a Godot project.
  godot-setup                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Installs the Godot engine and export templates.
  godot-version                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Increments the version in the project.godot file.
  godot-import <Path to Godot project> <Version of Godot to use>                                                                                                                                                                    Runs import process for Godot
  itchio-setup                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Downloads and installed Butler
  itchio-deploy <Path to the build directory> <e.g. <company>/<game-name>:<platform>>                                                                                                                                               Deploys a game to itch.io
  steamcmd-setup                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Setup SteamCMD
  steam-deploy                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Deploy to Steam
  csproj-versioning <Path to the .csproj> <The XML tag to update with the version number. Default is 'AssemblyVersion'.>                                                                                                            Commands related to versioning and git tags [default: AssemblyVersion]
  digitalocean <The IP address of the DigitalOcean droplet to deploy to> <The path to the systemd service file to deploy. e.g ./master_server.service> <The path to the build directory on the server. e.g ./builds/master_server>  Manage DigitalOcean resources

result.stdout:
Description:
  Commands related to versioning and git tags

Usage:
  mg-cli csproj-versioning <path> [<propertyName>] [options]

Arguments:
  <Path to the .csproj>
  <The XML tag to update with the version number. Default is 'AssemblyVersion'.>  [default: AssemblyVersion]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage DigitalOcean resources

Usage:
  mg-cli digitalocean <ip-address> <service-file-path> <build-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <The IP address of the DigitalOcean droplet to deploy to>
  <The path to the systemd service file to deploy. e.g ./master_server.service>
  <The path to the build directory on the server. e.g ./builds/master_server>

Options:
  -n, --nginx-config <The path to the nginx config file to deploy. e.g ./master_server.conf>
  -?, -h, --help                                                                              Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Manage DigitalOcean resources

Usage:
  mg-cli digitalocean <ip-address> <service-file-path> <build-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <The IP address of the DigitalOcean droplet to deploy to>
  <The path to the systemd service file to deploy. e.g ./master_server.service>
  <The path to the build directory on the server. e.g ./builds/master_server>

Options:
  -n, --nginx-config <The path to the nginx config file to deploy. e.g ./master_server.conf>
  -?, -h, --help                                                                              Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Send a Discord webhook with the latest build info

Usage:
  mg-cli discord-hook [options]

Options:
  -p, --projectPath <Path to the Godot project>
  -h, --hookUrl <Url to discord channel>
  -s, --steamUrl <Url to steam page>
  -l, --logoUrl <Url to steam capsule>
  --noChangeLog <Skips change log step in description>
  -?, -h, --help                                        Show help and usage information

  -h, --hookUrl <Url to discord channel>
  -s, --steamUrl <Url to steam page>
  -l, --logoUrl <Url to steam capsule>
  --noChangeLog <Skips change log step in description>
  -?, -h, --help                                        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Builds a Godot project.

Usage:
  mg-cli godot-build [options]

Options:
  -p, --projectPath <Path to Godot project>
  -v, --godotVersion <Version of Godot Engine to use for build.>
  -r, --export-release <ExportRelease preset name set in export_presets.cfg>
  -d, --export-debug <ExportDebug preset name set in export_presets.cfg>
  -i, --interactive <Enable interactive mode>
  -?, -h, --help                                                              Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  -v, --godotVersion <Version of Godot Engine to use for build.>
  -r, --export-release <ExportRelease preset name set in export_presets.cfg>
  -d, --export-debug <ExportDebug preset name set in export_presets.cfg>
  -i, --interactive <Enable interactive mode>
  -?, -h, --help                                                              Show help and usage information

  <e.g. <company>/<game-name>:<platform>>

result.stdout:
Description:
  Deploy to Steam

Usage:
  mg-cli steam-deploy [options]

Options:
  -p, --projectPath <Path to Godot project>
  --vdf <Path to the .vdf file>
  -u, --username <Steamworks username>
  -pw, --password <Steamworks password>
  -pv, --preview <Marks vdf file as Preview 1>
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information
